allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; print\('Network:', list\(d['NetworkSettings']['Networks'].keys\(\)\)\); print\('IP:', [v['IPAddress'] for v in d['NetworkSettings']['Networks'].values\(\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; [print\(k,':',v.get\('Name',''\)\) for k,v in d['Containers'].items\(\)]")
Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch --force --index-filter "git rm --cached --ignore-unmatch backend/.env.example" --prune-empty --tag-name-filter cat -- --all)
